bug_report.summary: Inspector section header “Process” is displayed as lowercase “process” after change (inconsistent capitalization)
steps_to_reproduce: Create a new 3D scene with a Node3D root.
Add a Decal node (or select an existing Decal).
In the Inspector dock, scroll to the built-in section headers and observe the “Process” section label.
expected_behaviors: Section headers in the Inspector should have consistent capitalization (e.g., “Process” capitalized, matching “Transform”, “Visibility”, “Node”, etc.).
actual_behaviors: The “Process” section header appears as “process” (lowercase) in the after-change build.

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering
